'''âd-r-y-b''' ('''kadaryeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jealous|jealous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jealous|jealous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-r-y-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadaryeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidaryeboko|thidaryeboko]] || [[word:jidaryeboko|jidaryeboko]] || [[word:shidaryeboko|shidaryeboko]] || [[word:kidaryeboko|kidaryeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudaryeboko|thuthudaryeboko]] || [[word:jujudaryeboko|jujudaryeboko]] || [[word:shushudaryeboko|shushudaryeboko]] || [[word:kukudaryeboko|kukudaryeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudaryeboko|thudaryeboko]] || [[word:judaryeboko|judaryeboko]] || [[word:shudaryeboko|shudaryeboko]] || [[word:kudaryeboko|kudaryeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodaryeboko|thodaryeboko]] || [[word:jodaryeboko|jodaryeboko]] || [[word:shodaryeboko|shodaryeboko]] || [[word:kodaryeboko|kodaryeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠdaryeboko|thĂŠdaryeboko]] || [[word:jĂŠdaryeboko|jĂŠdaryeboko]] || [[word:shĂŠdaryeboko|shĂŠdaryeboko]] || [[word:kĂŠdaryeboko|kĂŠdaryeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadaryeboko|thadaryeboko]] || [[word:jadaryeboko|jadaryeboko]] || [[word:shadaryeboko|shadaryeboko]] || [[word:kadaryeboko|kadaryeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadaryeboko|thadaryeboko]] || [[word:jadaryeboko|jadaryeboko]] || [[word:shadaryeboko|shadaryeboko]] || [[word:kadaryeboko|kadaryeboko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
